description: Create salary transactions and payroll-related postings
preflight: GET /salary/type to find salary type IDs
POST /salary/transaction to create the payroll transaction
endpoints: POST /salary/transaction — body: {date, payslips:[{employee:{id}, date, specifications:[{salaryType:{id}, amount, rate, count, description}]}]}
GET /salary/type — lookup salary types by name or number
common_errors: Salary tasks should use /salary/transaction, not generic vouchers, when the prompt is about payroll
Resolve employee and salary type IDs before posting the transaction
tips: If the prompt mentions base salary plus bonus, create one payslip with multiple specifications.
